test_scripts.generation_notes: This is a highly complex test case involving printer enrollment, subscription pause, time shifting, print job simulation, and detailed UI verification. The test uses existing helpers for enrollment and Gemini Rails Admin operations. New locators were added to PrintHistoryPage for billing cycle period card elements, progress bars, tooltips, and page usage tracking. Print job simulation uses send_rtp_devicestatus from common module. The test includes 21 steps matching the test case exactly, with comprehensive expect() assertions for all verifications. No time.sleep() used - all waits use Playwright's built-in mechanisms. All locators use data-testid selectors following framework standards.

page_additions.reason: TC C44873414 requires locators for billing cycle period card, complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages progress bar, info icons, tooltips, and page usage tracking elements that are not in the existing PrintHistoryPage

new_locators.name: billing_cycle_period_card
new_locators.description: Main billing cycle period card container

new_locators.name: complimentary_pages_progress_bar
new_locators.description: Progress bar for complimentary pages usage

new_locators.name: complimentary_pages_info_icon
new_locators.description: Info icon next to complimentary pages label

new_locators.name: complimentary_pages_value
new_locators.description: Text showing complimentary pages usage (e.g., '6 of 10 used')

new_locators.name: complimentary_pages_message
new_locators.description: Informational message below complimentary pages section

new_locators.name: additional_pages_progress_bar
new_locators.description: Progress bar for additional pages usage

new_locators.name: additional_pages_info_icon
new_locators.description: Info icon next to additional pages label

new_locators.name: additional_pages_value
new_locators.description: Text showing additional pages usage (e.g., '5 of 10 used')

new_methods.name: verify_billing_cycle_card_visible
new_methods.description: Verifies billing cycle period card is visible

new_methods.name: verify_complimentary_pages_value
new_methods.description: Verifies complimentary pages value with expected used/total and optional pause plan text

integration_instructions: a. Create folder test_flows/BillingCyclePeriodCard/ in AURA-FRAMEWORK
b. Copy billing_cycle_period_card.py into that folder
b. Add the new locators to the __init__ method
c. Add the new methods to the class body
4. Verify all data-testid selectors match the actual UI elements in the application
5. Run the test to verify: pytest test_flows/BillingCyclePeriodCard/billing_cycle_period_card.py
- Virtual printer creation and enrollment capabilities
- Gemini Rails Admin access for time shifting and subscription management
7. The test is complex and may take 10-15 minutes to complete due to enrollment, time shifting, and multiple page refreshes
